spoilers.title: Even if there’s no break from Oda after chapter 1181, we’ll still have to wait a week after 1181 because of Golden Week. [Early spoiler are possible] I have a feeling the next chapter will be more of
spoilers.text: Even if there’s no break from Oda after chapter 1181, we’ll still have to wait a week after 1181 because of Golden Week. [Early spoiler are possible] I have a feeling the next chapter will be more of a build-up chapter with all the fights, and it’ll end on a good cliffhanger.

spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Should Oda follow a similar route where Imu actually draws his Black Flames from the Underworld, then Imu has enormous potential. Unlike Luffy's Toon Force(maybe he get them too since to
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Should Oda follow a similar route where Imu actually draws his Black Flames from the Underworld, then Imu has enormous potential. Unlike Luffy's Toon Force(maybe he get them too since toon force does not know any limits), Imu could even have the power to manipulate time/space like Sho, or use his flames for maximum speed. Do you realize how much potential all of this has? That would indeed be the strongest Devil Fruit besides Luffy's Sun God Fruit. Imu gonna be very hax too, hard to defeat at all... Flux⚜️ (@fluxpiece) #ONEPIECE1180 Imu’s flames are lowkey similar to the Flames of Adolla/Adolla Burst — https://nitter.net/fluxpiece/status/2044474674206154969#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Zoro uses King of Hell 3 Dragon Style Onigiri, Imu blocks it with his tail. Do you know what kind of crazy durability feat Imu show? Kaido was injured by Tatsumaki, King didn't want to b
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Zoro uses King of Hell 3 Dragon Style Onigiri, Imu blocks it with his tail. Do you know what kind of crazy durability feat Imu show? Kaido was injured by Tatsumaki, King didn't want to be hit by KoH, and here Imu simply blocks it with his tail. This is proof of just how incredibly durable Imu is. This also shows that it's practically impossible to seriously damage Imu, because even if you break through his extremely strong durability, his regeneration power kicks in, which, combined with his CoC, makes it difficult for anyone to hurt him. Insane Imu scaling. That KoH Onigiri would hurt any top-tier character, for example...

misc.title: 先日、友人がイタリアであの車と遭遇したそうです。そう、1991年のアイルトン・セナのマクラーレンです。当時副編集長だった鳥嶋さんの企画ですが、車やメカを描く時の鳥山先生は本当にいきいきとして見えます。今頃、先生はセナとも再会しているのでしょうか😭
